SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-12-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-12-2018 BY JUDGE PRO TEM ANNE WONG. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY KERRI REYNOLDS, SVP, HUMAN RESOURCES. PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANNE WONG; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-12-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CLEM, OKSANA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT APPEN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
